payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the active memory for Sam related to Goldman. mem_old was filtered out because it is superseded, and superseded memories are not shown as current recall results.
payload.decision: Recall selected mem_new as the current matching memory for Sam at Goldman and filtered mem_old because mem_old is marked as superseded by the newer memory.

entity_resolution.reason: The query directly targets Sam, and recall evaluated memories linked to that existing entity.

memory_cards.statement: Sam is associated with Goldman in mem_new, which is eligible for recall because it is the active, non-superseded version.
mem_old was excluded from recall because it has been superseded and should not be presented as current.

details: Found relevant memory mem_new for Sam and Goldman.
Applied recall rule to suppress superseded memories from current results.

repair_options: Verify that mem_old has an explicit superseded-by link to mem_new.
If mem_old should still be recallable, remove or revise its superseded status.
Check whether punctuation or formatting differences caused duplicate memories instead of a clean update chain.

raw_text: {"intent":"explain_recall_decision","decision":"Recall selected mem_new as the current matching memory for Sam at Goldman and filtered mem_old because mem_old is marked as superseded by the newer memory.","memory_cards":[{"kind":"current_memory","statement":"Sam is associated with Goldman in mem_new, which is eligible for recall because it is the active, non-superseded version.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"subject"},{"name":"Goldman","type":"organization","role":"object"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"associated_with","object":"Goldman"}]},{"kind":"superseded_memory","statement":"mem_old was excluded from recall because it has been superseded and should not be presented as current.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"subject"},{"name":"Goldman","type":"organization","role":"object"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"mem_old","predicate":"superseded_by","object":"mem_new"}]}],"entity_resolution":{"action":"reuse_existing","entity_id":"Sam","reason":"The query directly targets Sam, and recall evaluated memories linked to that existing entity."},"conflict_classification":"supersession","answer":"Recall returned mem_new because it is the active memory for Sam related to Goldman. mem_old was filtered out because it is superseded, and superseded memories are not shown as current recall results.","citations":["mem_new","mem_old"],"repair_options":["Verify that mem_old has an explicit superseded-by link to mem_new.","If mem_old should still be recallable, remove or revise its superseded status.","Check whether punctuation or formatting differences caused duplicate memories instead of a clean update chain."],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["Matched query target: Sam.","Found relevant memory mem_new for Sam and Goldman.","Detected mem_old as superseded.","Applied recall rule to suppress superseded memories from current results."]}}
